title: Standard Curve Dilutions with CSV File
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol performs standard curve serial...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs standard curve serial dilutions using data from a CSV file. It has the option to perform up to 2 standard curves per run and the ability to modify stock concentrations. **Note**: The layout above depicts a full plate with 2 standard curves. --- * [Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 1.5 mL Safe-Lock Snapcap](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/racks-and-adapters/products/tube-rack-set-1) * [NEST 96 Well Plate 100 µL PCR Full Skirt](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/lab-plates/products/nest-0-1-ml-96-well-pcr-plate-full-skirt) * [Opentrons 300uL Tips](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/opentrons-tips/products/opentrons-300ul-tips) For more detailed information on compatible labware, please visit our [Labware Library](https://labware.opentrons.com/). --- **Deck Setup** **CSV File Information** The protocol will require a CSV file to be uploaded in order to properly function. Please use the following [Serial Dilutions Excel Spreadsheet Template (.XLSX Format)](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/543bf9/serial_dilutions_template.xlsx) to update your values. Once the values are updated click `Save As` and then save it in `.CSV` format. You can then upload that CSV to the protocol for your run. **Protocol Steps** 1. Transfer 44.5 uL of Diluent into Int1 (Well A1). 2. Transfer 5.5 uL from Stock1 into Int1 3. Mix Int1 3 times, perform blow out, touch tip, then discard tip. **Note**: This process will repeat as it iterates through the rows in the CSV and add diluent first, then the sample from the previous well or specified well.

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
